Registry / Terms / temperature coefficient of the lamp

temperature coefficient of the lamp

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00407 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

#00407
2.7
dimensionless quantity numerically equal to a change in the radiance temperature of the ribbon (in °C) under changes of the ambient temperature by 1 °C at a constant lamp current
